name: Energy & Mining
description: Upstream and downstream energy, mining operations, and renewable energy project insurance

content.description: Specialized energy and mining insurance covering upstream oil & gas exploration and production, midstream pipelines and storage, downstream refining and petrochemical, and mining operations across North and South America. Includes construction all-risks for energy megaprojects, operational all-risks, business interruption, control of well, and environmental liability. The Americas market covers shale oil operations in the Permian Basin, deepwater Gulf of Mexico platforms, Canadian oil sands, Brazilian pre-salt fields, and Chilean copper mines. Growing renewable energy portfolio includes wind farms, solar parks, and battery storage facilities.
content.productExamples: Upstream E&P, Downstream refinery, Pipeline, Mining all-risks, Renewable energy, Construction all-risks, Control of well
